summary: The team is sprinting toward a September digital release of the 'New Chinese Playbook for Going Global' report with IE, while simultaneously redesigning the knowledge website and prioritizing SEO for Asia Star and Intelligent China programs.
summaryDetail: The biggest initiative is the joint report with IE, 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global,' targeting a digital release by early September. Felix needs to create a one-pager proposal for structure and promotion, Meng is translating alumni case studies, and Julie is securing op-eds from President Santiago and the Dean. Launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson are being confirmed. Concurrently, the knowledge website redesign is in final design iteration—Joseph and Joker are incorporating feedback to show more articles and bring BCI/BSI indices to the homepage. Urgent this week: expedite social media agency selection (Media Minds prioritized), follow up on Tech in Asia partnership paperwork (Xuan after vacation), and process UNICON membership. Coming up: Joseph will create the Indonesia program webpage once Ben provides details, and the team will audit conversion tracking and analyze participant profiles for Asia Star and Intelligent China SEO optimization.

meetings.title: 邮箱账号与设备登录问题讨论
meetings.summary: 讨论邮箱账号因多设备使用旧密码导致被锁的问题，并指导重新登录和更新密码。

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting
meetings.summary: The team discussed worship and a three-story hall, but no clear marketing topics were identified.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: The team reviewed two redesign proposals for the knowledge website, finding Joker's version too similar to the current site and preferring Joseph's more editorial layout with more articles displayed. They decided to combine elements from both, focusing on showing more articles and bringing indices like BCI to the homepage.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to improve search ranking for programs like Asia Star and Intelligent China, prioritizing these two programs over US partnerships. They plan to audit existing conversion tracking and analyze target audience profiles.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, school brochure updates, CES quotes, Ding Hight Hall video, Asia Start articles, Davos press release, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on press release approach and agency prioritization.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team plans a joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a working title 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'. They discuss content structure, launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson, and agree to aim for a digital release by early September.

decisions.text: 删除所有设备上的旧Outlook账号，重新登录以更新密码。
decisions.meetingTitle: 邮箱账号与设备登录问题讨论

decisions.text: Remove dedicated video section; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Show more articles on homepage, with pinned article and latest articles below.
Bring indices (BCI, BSI) to the knowledge homepage.
Keep school menu at top left and knowledge menu centered.
Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.
Focus on SEO and content optimization for these two programs.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, incorporating 10 points or turning into 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time sensitivity.
IE report translation not to exceed 50% of original Chinese report.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with joint distribution.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report will include a main research feature from Professor Leeway, plus op-eds from President Santiago, Dean, and possibly an industry perspective from an alum or case studies.
Target digital release by early September to allow promotion through end of year.
Joseph will create the Indonesia program webpage
decisions.meetingTitle: RE: 关于Global Program新开印尼新兴市场项目的审批

decisions.text: Xuan will follow up on Tech in Asia partnership after vacation
decisions.meetingTitle: 回复: 答复: CKGSB X Tech In ASIA

decisions.text: Kaylee to update Shengjia and invite Prof Li Wei for EV event
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: CKGSB-EuroCham event collaboration on EV
